name: sqlite-modern-cpp-dev
title: sqlite-modern-cpp-dev
summary: Modern sqlite cpp wrapper - development files
description:
Modern sqlite cpp wrapper - development files
This library is a lightweight modern C++ wrapper around sqlite C API.
.
This package provides the header-only library for sqlite-modern-cpp.
